name: ARCH CAPITAL GROUP LTD.
business: Arch provides insurance, reinsurance and mortgage insurance on a worldwide basis through its wholly owned subsidiaries, focusing on writing specialty lines of property and casualty insurance and reinsurance, as well as mortgage insurance and reinsurance.

exposures.sentence: Arch provides insurance, reinsurance and mortgage insurance on a worldwide basis through its wholly owned subsidiaries.
Our mortgage operations include mortgage insurance and reinsurance in the U.S. and internationally, as well as participation in GSE credit risk-sharing transactions.
We employ artificial intelligence (AI) technology and analytics to drive data-driven decisions, streamline processes or help serve our customers and partners.
